market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: 2BR with Free Parking - Prime City Location
analysis.rewritten_desc: A spacious two-bedroom home ideal for four guests, featuring complimentary on-site parking and comfortable living areas. Located in a vibrant neighborhood, this private residence offers easy access to local attractions, shops, and dining options. With a 4.31 rating based on 480 reviews, guests can expect a hassle-free stay in this well-maintained property. The home includes all essential amenities to create a memorable visit, and its central location makes it perfect for both leisure and business travelers. The nightly rate of £204 includes full use of the property, ensuring privacy and flexibility throughout your stay.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize an exterior photo of the property as the cover image to showcase street presence and parking visibility. This creates immediate trust by demonstrating accessibility and space.
key_diagnosis: Listings with £204 rate are +17% above cohort median (which is £175) while occupancy is -45% below median (15.2% vs 28.3%)
Host lacks Superhost status and has only 480 cumulative reviews despite 0+ years hosting
Property type 'Entire home' is strong but title doesn't maximize SEO keywords like 'spacious' or 'fully-equipped'
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £204 rate is 17% above city median but occupancy is 45% lower than average at 15.2% (cohort median 28.3%)
